summary: Changed icloud-tabs stale-data hint to warn when Safari is closed, regardless of tab count, while suppressing on unknown state or --refresh.
reason: CloudTabs.db can contain a non-empty last-synced tab set when Safari is closed, so zero-tab-only hints missed stale data.
validated_outcome: GOFLAGS=-mod=readonly go build ./..., go vet ./..., go test ./internal/..., and gofmt -l on changed Go files all passed; TestICloudTabs_StaleHint mutation-covers closed/running/unknown/refresh gates.
